cards.back: IP Security (IPSec) is a suite of protocols that provides security for IP networks by encrypting and authenticating data
IP Security Policy (IPSec Policy) is a set of security associations that define the security settings for a particular connection
Encapsulating Security Payload (ESP) is a protocol used in IPSec to encrypt and authenticate data
Combining security associations (SA) is a process used in IPSec to combine multiple security associations into a single association
Internet key exchange (IKE) is a protocol used in IPSec to securely exchange encryption keys between two parties
